name: SVN2 Indoor Golf Newbury Park
address: 3311 Grande Vista Dr, Thousand Oaks, CA 91320
about: SVN2 Indoor Golf is a multi-location facility featuring private, self-service bays equipped with TrackMan technology. The venue offers flexible booking options, allowing players to pay per session or purchase monthly memberships for access to 7 hours of play. Designed for golfers seeking focused practice, SVN2 provides a premium environment with detailed swing metrics and simulated rounds on championship courses. Operating from early morning to late evening, the facilities cater to serious golfers looking for data-driven improvement and a clean, well-maintained atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading TrackMan simulators provide instant, detailed feedback on every swing
Private, self-service bays offer a focused environment free from distractions
Flexible pricing includes off-peak specials and credit packages for significant savings
Convenient early morning and late-night hours accommodate diverse schedules
Premium amenities allow players to bring their own food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Players are allowed to bring their own food into the facility
Players are allowed to bring their own drinks into the facility

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar technology with dual camera system for detailed ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own golf clubs to use at SVN2 Indoor Golf.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, SVN2 allows you to bring your own food and non-alcoholic beverages into the facility. Alcohol is also permitted to be brought in.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes depends on the course and number of players, but typical rounds at simulator venues range from 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: SVN2 Indoor Golf is not specifically marketed as a kid-friendly venue and appears to cater more to serious golfers and adults.
